allow: PowerShell(venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import openai; import dotenv; import playwright; import bs4; import requests; import rich; import pydantic; print\('所有依赖导入成功'\)")

PowerShell($OutputEncoding = [Console]::OutputEncoding = [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\(\); venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import openai, dotenv, playwright, bs4, requests, rich, pydantic; print\('All imports OK'\)")
PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING='utf-8'; venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import asyncio; from src.scraper import run; asyncio.run\(run\(\)\)")

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING='utf-8'; venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('data/optimized_products.json','r',encoding='utf-8'\)\); [print\(json.dumps\({'title':d['title'],'optimized':d.get\('optimized_title',''\),'price':d['price'],'suggested':d['suggested_price']},ensure_ascii=False\)\) for d in data[:5]]")
